chunks.text: Come join Google, the Berkeley EECS Department, and the Association of Women in EECS (AWE) at the Berkeley EECS Women’s History Month Kickoff Event! The event will include breakfast, and you can take home your very own succulent! Event Details: Wozniak Lounge, 9:30am – 11:45am on Friday, March 1st.
chunks.question: What is the Berkeley EECS Women's History Month Kickoff Event?
chunks.answer: A breakfast event with succulents and raffles.

chunks.text: Professor Tsu-Jae King Liu, College of Engineering Dean, and Audrey Sillers, Director of EECS Diversity and Student Affairs, will be formally announcing the kickoff event and the month-long EECS Women’s History Month celebration at around 10:30am. Also keep an eye out for some awesome raffle prizes provided by Google. We will be announcing raffle winners at 10:00am, 10:30am, and 11:00am so you don’t want to miss out. Everyone, including students, staff, and faculty, is welcome.
chunks.question: Who will announce the EECS Women's History Month celebration?
chunks.answer: Professor Tsu-Jae King Liu and Audrey Sillers.

chunks.text: The event facebook page can be found here! You can find out more about Berkeley EECS Women’s History Month either at our facebook page or at our website.
chunks.question: Where can you find more information about the event?
chunks.answer: On the Facebook page or website.
